transcript: So till now, I've experienced two national pageants. One was Femina Miss India and the second was Miss Universe India. And my experience in both was very different. Femina Miss India, I date in my grooming session for almost 35 days and Miss Universe India was just 12 days. So the way the organizations organized both the pageants was very different. In Miss Universe, I was expected to always be in high heels, be in glamorous dresses, sparkly ones, very glammed up all the time with amazing hair. But I think a lot of the experiences that I took away was how diverse the contestants were, because for the first time, Glamnan, the organizers behind Miss Universe India allowed NRIs to participate. So people from USA came, people who were runners up in Miss USA, in Super National and other countries participated.
